description_long: This bungalow features a prominent gable roof with dark, overlapping shingles and a mix of stone and light-colored siding on the exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch with columns, landscaped shrubbery, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. Large windows are distributed across both floors, with some grouped and others set individually, providing ample natural light. A detached carport or garage structure is visible adjacent to the main building, connected by a paved driveway. The rear and side elevations reveal balconies and additional outdoor living spaces, as well as a fenced yard area. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort and outdoor accessibility.
description: A two-story bungalow with a gable roof, stone and light siding, covered porch, large windows, and landscaped entry. Features include a detached carport, balconies, and fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, landscaped entry, main entrance, and adjacent carport.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the gable roof, stone siding, and the carport structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying balconies, grouped windows, and fenced yard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch, driveway, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
